Class DiagnosticsTestHarness

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class DiagnosticsTestHarness extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Reusable JUnit harness that boots a self-contained MagicUtils runtime for running diagnostics without a real Minecraft server.

Historically every consumer (for example verified-plugin) copied a fake Platform plus the ConfigManager / LoggerCore / MagicRuntime wiring into each test. This harness centralises that boilerplate: constructing it stands up a TestPlatform, a ConfigManager, a LoggerCore and a MagicRuntime configured with manageConfigManager(false) and autoRegisterShutdown(false) so the test owns lifecycle explicitly.

The harness is AutoCloseable; use it in a try-with-resources block so that close() tears the components down in the correct order (runtime -> configManager -> platform).

try (DiagnosticsTestHarness harness = DiagnosticsTestHarness.create(tempDir)) {
    DiagnosticsService diagnostics = harness.installDiagnostics(registry ->
        MyDiagnosticsSupport.registryConfigurer(...).accept(registry));
    DiagnosticReport report = diagnostics.runAll(DiagnosticRunRequest.standard());
    assertTrue(report.isPublishable());
}

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes the harness, releasing all backing resources in the correct order: runtime, then config manager, then platform (which stops the scheduler thread).
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.config.ConfigManager
    configManager()
    Returns the config manager owned by this harness.
    static DiagnosticsTestHarness
    create(Path configDir)
    Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory using the default logger name.
    static DiagnosticsTestHarness
    create(Path configDir, String loggerName)
    Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory with a custom logger name.
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticsService
    installDiagnostics()
    Installs the default diagnostics service (with built-in MagicUtils checks) into the runtime.
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticsService
    installDiagnostics(@Nullable Consumer<dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticRegistry> registryConfigurer)
    Installs the diagnostics service and lets the caller register custom checks, mirroring DiagnosticsSupport.install(MagicRuntime, Consumer).
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger.LoggerCore
    logger()
    Returns the logger core owned by this harness.
    TestPlatform
    platform()
    Returns the in-memory test platform.
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime
    runtime()
    Returns the runtime container backing this harness.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static DiagnosticsTestHarness create(Path configDir)
      Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory using the default logger name.
      Parameters:
      configDir - base directory for configs/lang files (typically a JUnit @TempDir); must not be null
      Returns:
      a fully wired harness ready for diagnostics

    • create

      public static DiagnosticsTestHarness create(Path configDir, String loggerName)
      Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory with a custom logger name.
      Parameters:
      configDir - base directory for configs/lang files (typically a JUnit @TempDir); must not be null
      loggerName - plugin/mod name used for the LoggerCore prefix; must not be null
      Returns:
      a fully wired harness ready for diagnostics

    • runtime

      public dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime runtime()
      Returns the runtime container backing this harness.
      Returns:
      runtime instance

    • platform

      public TestPlatform platform()
      Returns the in-memory test platform.
      Returns:
      platform instance

    • configManager

      public dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.config.ConfigManager configManager()
      Returns the config manager owned by this harness.
      Returns:
      config manager

    • logger

      public dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger.LoggerCore logger()
      Returns the logger core owned by this harness.
      Returns:
      logger core

    • installDiagnostics

      public dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticsService installDiagnostics()
      Installs the default diagnostics service (with built-in MagicUtils checks) into the runtime.
      Returns:
      installed diagnostics service

    • installDiagnostics

      public dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticsService installDiagnostics(@Nullable @Nullable Consumer<dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticRegistry> registryConfigurer)
      Installs the diagnostics service and lets the caller register custom checks, mirroring DiagnosticsSupport.install(MagicRuntime, Consumer).
      Parameters:
      registryConfigurer - optional configurer invoked with the diagnostic registry after built-in checks are registered; may be null
      Returns:
      installed diagnostics service

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the harness, releasing all backing resources in the correct order: runtime, then config manager, then platform (which stops the scheduler thread).

      Idempotent with respect to the runtime and config manager; safe to call from a try-with-resources block.

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
